questions.question: In the TV show Welcome Back, Kotter, what was the collective name of the students he taught...or tried to teach?
Name the country comedian, known for her hat with a price tag attached, who was a mainstay of the Grand Ole Opry and the TV show Hee Haw.
On what did Starship build this city?
Who continually made headlines as the militant head of the Palestinian Liberation Organization?
Name the company that advertised in the 70s with, "My bologna has a first name."
